title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document the issue clearly, including dates, times, and any relevant details or evidence. Next, submit your written grievance to your direct supervisor or manager within 10 business days of the incident. If the issue involves your supervisor, you may contact the HR department directly at hr@company.com. HR will acknowledge receipt of your complaint within 3 business days and will initiate an investigation. The investigation process typically takes up to 15 business days, during which HR may reach out for additional information. Once the investigation is complete, HR will provide you with a resolution or next steps. If you are not satisfied with the outcome, you may appeal the decision by submitting a written request to HR within 5 business days of receiving the resolution.
